headline: Palantir’s Miami Move Raises Fresh Questions For Valuation And Growth
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) is relocating its corporate headquarters from Denver to Miami. The company announced the move as a significant shift in its corporate footprint and operating base. The relocation follows an earlier headquarters move in 2020, highlighting an ongoing reset of where and how Palantir operates. Palantir focuses on data analytics software for government and commercial clients, with tools that aim to help organizations work with complex datasets for decision...

headline: Energy stocks rise on oil prices, BlackRock consortium to acquire AES
summary: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including energy stocks moving higher on spiking oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F), shares of Palantir Technologies (PLTR) getting a boost amid escalations in the Middle East after the US bombing of Iran over the weekend, and BlackRock-owned (BLK) Global Infrastructure Partners leading a consortium to acquire AES (AES) for $10.7 billion. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

content.title: Energy stocks rise on oil prices, BlackRock consortium to acquire AES

Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including energy stocks moving higher on spiking oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F), shares of Palantir Technologies (PLTR) getting a boost amid escalations in the Middle East after the US bombing of Iran over the weekend, and BlackRock-owned (BLK) Global Infrastructure Partners leading a consortium to acquire AES (AES) for $10.7 billion.

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Oil Stocks Heat Up Amid Iran War As S&P 500 Slips; How High Will Oil Prices Go?
summary: Oil stocks crowded the top of the S&P 500 early Monday as the U.S.-Israel war against Iran entered its third day.  The war is damaging Iran's oil export infrastructure and snarling tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.  Supply worry boosted the U.S. crude oil price 6.4% to $71.30 a barrel in the futures market.

content.title: Oil Stocks Heat Up Amid Iran War As S&P 500 Slips; How High Will Oil Prices Go?
content.summary: Oil stocks crowded the top of the S&P 500 early Monday as the U.S.-Israel war against Iran entered its third day.  The war is damaging Iran's oil export infrastructure and snarling tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.  Supply worry boosted the U.S. crude oil price 6.4% to $71.30 a barrel in the futures market.

headline: Could Palantir Technologies Accidentally Kill Its Golden AI Goose?
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) has ridden the AI wave to extraordinary heights, emerging as one of the standout beneficiaries in the tech landscape.
